SEARCH
Package org.bukkit

Interface Fluid

All Superinterfaces:
Comparable<Fluid>, Keyed, OldEnum<Fluid>, RegistryAware
public interface Fluid extends OldEnum<Fluid>, Keyed, RegistryAware
Represents a fluid type.

  • Method Details

    • getKey

      @NotNull @Deprecated(since="1.21.4") NamespacedKey getKey()
      Deprecated.
      A key might not always be present, use RegistryAware.getKeyOrThrow() instead.
      Return the namespaced identifier for this object.
      Specified by:
      getKey in interface Keyed
      Returns:
      this object's key
      See Also:
      • RegistryAware.getKeyOrThrow()
      • RegistryAware.isRegistered()

    • valueOf

      @NotNull @Deprecated(since="1.21.3") static Fluid valueOf(@NotNull String name)
      Deprecated.
      only for backwards compatibility, use Registry.get(NamespacedKey) instead.
      Parameters:
      name - of the fluid.
      Returns:
      the fluid with the given name.

    • values

      @NotNull @Deprecated(since="1.21.3") static Fluid[] values()
      Deprecated.
      use Iterable.iterator().
      Returns:
      an array of all known fluids.
